title: AllTheMons x Mega Showdown
description: Always wanted to play Mega Showdown with AllTheMons? Well that's the version you have been waiting for!
body:
## What is AllTheMons x Mega Showdown?
AllTheMons is a collaborative effort from many contributors to add as many Pokemon as possible to Cobblemon. All of the addons below have been modified to ensure that there's no overlap, which prevents game-breaking bugs/crashes you would experience without AllTheMons. AllTheMons x Mega Showdown aims to bring that experience to all of you that use MSD and don't want to miss out on using ATM in conjunction!    

### This _requires_ Mega Showdown and don't use this together with regular AllTheMons - you _replace_ ATM with ATM x MSD!

## Addon & Mod suggestions: 
The following addons and mods are personally approved and/or tested my me and my recommendations. They feature full compatibility with AllTheMons x Mega Showdown and might make your game a little bit _cooler!_

<details>
<summary>Click for Addon & Mod suggestions!</summary>

### [Legendary Monuments](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-monuments)
Adds many Structures and Dimensions where legendary Pokémon can be obtained. ATM x MSD automatically disables random legendary spawns from this addon if installed _(only the ones that are obtainable through LM)_
### [Lost Lore](https://modrinth.com/datapack/poketwo)
Adds many Pokémon from the extended canon that is the Anime/Movies, Manga, Side Games and more. Okay it's my own addon so #ad I guess?
### [Better Caps](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-caps)
Tired of Pikachus flat brim? Better Caps turns his cap into an actual three-dimensional piece of art. Also my addon tbf but I wouldn't have made it if I didn't feel like someone might need it!
</details>

## How to install:
Generally, most Cobblemon addons that add Pokémon are both data **&** resource packs in one file, so installing them automatically via the modrinth launcher **won't** work - You have to do it manually. Please follow the instructions below to make sure ATM x MSD is properly installed and can function as intended!

<details>
<summary>Click for instructions!</summary>

### Singleplayer:
**Put the .zip in `/saves/[WORLDNAME]/datapacks`** _**not** `/datapacks`_  
**Put the .zip in `/resourcepacks`**  
**Enable in game `ESC - Options - Resource Packs`**  

### Servers:
**Put the .zip in `/world/datapacks`**    
_Sometimes it's called myworld, or something similar, sometimes it has a name instead_    
_If you're in doubt about the correct folder, consult your server providers guide on how to add datapacks_  

**Every Player has to have the .zip installed as a `Resource Pack`**  
_Best option if for them to have it installed and enabled in their clients_    
_It's possible to add them to server resources, but note that there have been issues with this for some cobblemon addons, so try whatever method suits you better_  
</details>
  
## What does ATM x MSD include?:
- Overrides some Models in Cobblemon & MSD to provide better ones
- Adds more than [130 unique Pokémon](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1nPZxD0zWqaCsulp_RCRTiQS5YxUrdoE6xv8rsMoWSYs/edit?tab=t.0) to expand Cobblemon!
- All of them are obtainable in survival without compromises!
- Fixed & added most Pokédex entries and descriptions
- Adds all missing recipes from Mega Showdown
- Riding support for lots of the added Pokémon
- Somewhat lore accurate spawn locations

## Documentation:
### General Documentation:
- A list of [all Pokémon](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1nPZxD0zWqaCsulp_RCRTiQS5YxUrdoE6xv8rsMoWSYs/edit?tab=t.0) in ATM x MSD
- A list of [all Evolutions](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1nPZxD0zWqaCsulp_RCRTiQS5YxUrdoE6xv8rsMoWSYs/edit?tab=t.ubptddymfczj#bookmark=id.371w1jtqcvz4) that differ from the original games
- Special methods to obtain [Type-Null, Mewtwo and Genesect](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1nPZxD0zWqaCsulp_RCRTiQS5YxUrdoE6xv8rsMoWSYs/edit?tab=t.rvlm7mgw1drd#bookmark=id.9qv85e7djktk)
- A list of all [rideable Pokémon](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1nPZxD0zWqaCsulp_RCRTiQS5YxUrdoE6xv8rsMoWSYs/edit?tab=t.q24fq3i3vrlk#bookmark=id.dj0xbsivvmri)
### Where all included Pokémon spawn:
1. Join the [AllTheMons Discord](https://discord.com/invite/few6NPdXjD)
2. Type `!spawns` in the bot-commands channel    
From there our fully automated bot will tell you all about the spawns - including rarity, spawn conditions, requirements and biomes. It also includes all base Cobblemon spawns so you can find everything in one place.

**NOTE**: REMEMBER - ATM x MSD **will** automatically disable random spawns for the legendaries obtainable in [Legendary Monuments](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-monuments)  _(if installed)_! Refer to their wiki or the documentation linked above to check which ones are included in LM.    

**NOTE no.2**: **Don't** ask questions about AllTheMons x Mega Showdown or Mega Showdown itself over there, and note that most commands over there don't apply to this version     
If we notice continued breakage of that rule you'll be muted/banned and won't be able to receive any support/usage of the spawn bot.

### Where to get help, leave a suggestion or report a bug?:
1. Join the [Mega Showdown Discord](https://discord.com/invite/egeWG4GXhN) 
2. Go to [this](https://discord.com/channels/1334216416617824386/1384822450176659476) channel

Again - **don't** ask questions regarding AllTheMons x Mega Showdown or Mega Showdown itself on the ATM discord. If we notice continued breakage of that rule you'll be muted/banned and won't be able to receive any support/usage of the spawn bot.

## Custom Items for Form Changes:
**All of these have been removed in v3.3.0** and moved to [Lost Lore](https://modrinth.com/datapack/poketwo). The list below is only kept for archiving
<details>
<summary>Click to expand!</summary>

If you want to know how each of those forms look like, consider checking the gallery.    
As mentioned above - those will **not** show in creative, JEI/REI/EMI, you **have** to craft them.     
Again - **all of these have been removed in v3.3.0** and moved to [Lost Lore](https://modrinth.com/datapack/poketwo). The list below is only kept for archiving

### Ancient Light Ball
- Give Pichu to hold _(cosmetic slot)_ to turn it into the HG/SS Spiky Eared variant
![Recipe Ancient Light Ball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ccc1b296a7b289945e50e0611202d3f8c199342.jpeg)
### Binding Armor
- Right-click Mewtwo to turn it into his **Armored** variant
![Recipe Binding Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75279a9254391e0721a8b35f2237f0bf26332858.jpeg)
### Corrupted Wish
- Right-click Groudon to turn it into his **Meta** form _(Wish Maker Movie)_
![Recipe Corrupted Wish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c33d0b3bfecb4ad80bb87f73026587eee0ed7693_0.webp)
### Green/Red Scarf
- Give Lucario/Riolu to hold _(cosmetic slot)_ for a Mystery Dungeon inspired scarf
![Recipe Green Scarf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3348953a83179d7b85f63871c2b7a404b587f661_0.webp)
![Recipe Red Scarf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7f1d9d3ee536c48b8df6769bb2034fbdd3be681_0.webp)
### Pledge Fragment
- Give Keldeo to hold _(cosmetic slot)_ to turn it into its Resolute form _(cosmetic only)_
![Pledge Fragment Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/920fa125de9039c5eaca94022d6b85dcd422fe1f.jpeg)
### Shadow Energy
- Right-click Mewtwo/Lugia to turn them into their **Shadow** variants
![Shadow Energy Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0236cf554a09fea976357daacc933a8cb4e0e496.jpeg)
### Time Gear
- Give Dialga to hold to turn it into its Primal State _(from Mystery Dungeon)_
![Time Gear Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29a9d5cc2dfd0107ec6fe30be50836ba01b8be71.jpeg)
### Water Shuriken
- Give Greninja to hold _(cosmetic slot)_ to turn him into Ash Greninja _(cosmetic only)_
![Water Shuriken Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12300ce2a2e835f79de525e219c096c0124debb2_0.webp)
### Shadow Mewtwonite X/Y
- Give **Shadow** Mewtwo to hold so it can Mega evolve into the Shadow Megas
![Mewtwonite SX Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c70f955ad70dda3ac17a1e6f8c169b54dde6c0dd_0.webp)
![Mewtwonite SY Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/734551c5cded0fd58a237318a50d036cd51ba4f3_0.webp)
### Slowbrogonite
- Give **galarian** Slowbro to hold so it can Mega evolve into a Galarian Mega
![Slowbrogonite Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd16e0ec9940150e6d19fa8df8e8b2ff5470c0db.jpeg)
### Costume Boxes
- Right-click Lucario/Incineroar with their respective box to switch costumes
![Costume Box Lucario Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a94bb16b8887cfe9c22e48f978e2df13472e7b4.jpeg)
![Costume Box Incineroar Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf133e39d3a91aa205188e5a778dc86b8ff136af.jpeg)
</details>

## Incompatible Addons _(delete those)_:
<details>
<summary>Click to unfold!</summary>

Due to the collaborative nature of this addon and the amount of different assets added - there's lots of incompatible mods and addons. The lists below include stuff that is incompatible with Mega Showdown itself _(since well, this addon requires it)_
### Premade Modpacks:
- You **can** get it to work but since they might use lots of incompatible addons for core aspects of gameplay, it’d be **a lot** of file management to fix it. You're better off leaving it as it is since or make your own one with the entire incompatible addons list in mind. **If** you want to make it work any modpack, your best advice is asking the modpack author or people in their discord for help/advice.  

### Incompatible Mods:
- Ascension Megamons, Cobblemon Alphas, Cobblemon Megas, Cobblemon Showdown Assets, Cobblemon Drop Loot Tables, Cobblemon Updated Enhanced, Complete Cobblemon Collection (CCC), Flourish, Genesis Forms, Gimme That Gimmick, Gravels Extended Battle, Hiddenmons, Hulis Z-Crystals, Legends Untold (Reborn), Myths & Legends

### All addons that contain _any_ overlapping Pokémon/Files, here's _some_ examples:
- AllTheMegas, CardboardMons, CavsCobbleMons, Cobblemon More Level Up Moves, Cobblemon Radical Changes, CobbleRemodels, Complete Cobblemon Collection (CCC), Coolrex's Cobblemon Collection, DracoMon, GlitchDex, Journey Mounts, Legends & Myths, MelloMons, Missing Legends, Mysticmons, Myths & Legends, Planeta's Pokémon Pack, Pokeodyssey, Shadow Lugia Addon, Soul National Dex Learnsets, Soul Megas, Stellar Blue (maril line)...

### All addons that are already included in AllTheMons x Mega Showdown:
- Allones Additions, Ashimons, BoniMons, Cloudmons, Cobblecats, Genomons, HiddenMons, Hydro Reanimodel Pack, Kale's Collection, LackingMons, MissingMons, MonkeyMons, MoreMons, MundialMons, NadyMons3, OdysseyMons, Pigeons PokePack, PokeCostumes, Pokemans, TDmons, The Jewel Pokemon & WaviMons

### All other versions of AllTheMons:
- This includes the regular ATM addon, other forks like BCG x ATM and all older versions of ATM x MSD
</details>

## Permissions & License _(usage on modpacks/public servers)_
<details>
<summary>Click to unfold!</summary>
  
All Developers of these packs gave their full permission for their assets to be used, proof of these can be found within the addon file, in a folder titled _"Proofs of Permission"_  
We did not create any models, textures, or animations, that's not to say the ATM team didn't do anything though - this pack has hours and hours of work put into its spawns, species files, bug fixing, creating documentation, and much, much more, all done by EasySqueeze, Mayayoh, N8nt and myself.  
Due to the collaborative effort, AllTheMons has a **strict** license to make this even possible in the first place. Read it before starting a server or modpack containing the addon. You can find it [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tPvYDxqcby4cU0LlDGnxFKE-_fZ7GSg733G7MBN8Dos/edit?tab=t.y0gf8gi0vspf).
</details>
